we grew up together from primary school. we were so close like sisters and shared all every milestone together
went to university together an had our 1st heartbreak

0.model_generation: Good evening. Today we gather to celebrate my dearest friend, whose laughter has been the soundtrack of my life since primary school. We navigated childhood with hand-in-hand adventures, building forts, sharing secrets, and dreaming of tomorrow together. In university we faced our first heartbreak side by side, trading tissues and late-night pizza as we pieced our hearts back together. We cheered as each degree was earned, landed our first jobs and celebrated the purchase of our very own homes. Through every twist, every milestone, you’ve been my rock, my confidante, my sister in every way that truly matters. Your generosity, humor and unwavering loyalty have enriched my days beyond measure. Today, I honor the incredible woman you’ve become and look forward to all the chapters still unwritten. Here’s to you—may your future be as bright and beautiful as the joy you bring into my life.
0.final_version: my friend, my sister, my love, my confidant this day you are getting married , leaving me behind but im happy for you.he's a good man. you deserve to smile. i reember we were neighbours in primary school when they had their individual issues we still went and chilled with each. ou took care of bullies, while i forcused o academics . you are my hero in many ways than you know , when i got m 1st heartbreak you were ready for war. i did the same for you. we danced cried and laughed together . we have fought but made a concious decision to continue talking even in dificult times. i love you .we had our all together hopefully soon you will say your speech at my wedding, when i get the caurage to leave my house without you. mr groom i call several times a night please answer my calls even when she ignores them i just wanna hear her breathing. to the couple

1.details:

understanding what went wrong

1.model_generation: I am writing to apologize for my actions and take full responsibility for the pain I caused. I understand that by interrupting you and ignoring your feelings yesterday, I disrespected your perspective and created distance between us. Looking back, I realize I spoke without thinking and failed to consider how important our conversations are. I value the laughter we shared on weekend hikes, the late-night talks, and the trust we built over time. I want to open space for any questions or concerns you may have—I’m here to listen honestly and answer with sincerity. I also want to give you the time and room you need to process this. When you feel ready, I hope we can talk through what went wrong and find a way forward together. Thank you for all the good moments we’ve enjoyed; your friendship means more to me than I can express.
1.final_version: Hey friend . id like to take this opportunity to aknowledge my absence for the past couple of months with me not getting back to you. ive been swamped wih planning for my doctrate while completing my masters and work also got hectic , i know w e usually tak about a mini check up however i did not stick to the plan . which is my fault, im a bad friend , if you have any questions i dnt mind answering them as i feel l owe you many many re asurances for you to understand my side , imm open , i miss us going out having lunch in different restuarants just to taste different cuisines , i miss us going to rock festivals with you and your husband have fun and come back exhausted for few days , you have all the time in the world to think over , just know i aknowledge that i've hurt you , i promise it wont happen again i love you

2.model_generation:
My dear daughter,  
I want you to know how beautiful you are inside and out. Your kindness lights up every room you enter. You are so special to me—my heart overflows with pride because you truly are the best daughter in the world. No matter what challenges come your way, you have the strength and determination to overcome them. I believe in you completely. Whatever you set your mind to in this life, you will achieve it. Remember that every dream you hold deserves your effort and every goal you chase is within reach. I will always stand by your side, cheering you on, celebrating your victories, and lifting you up when you need support. Keep shining, my love, and never forget how deeply you are cherished. You can do anything you set your heart on—and I know you will.

3.model_generation: Today we gather to celebrate the life of Elizabeth Thompson, whose radiant kindness touched every heart she met. A dedicated wife of forty-five years, loving mother to Emma, Daniel, and Sarah, and proud grandmother of eight, Elizabeth devoted her days to nurturing, guiding, and inspiring those she loved. Her neighbor’s garden bloomed under her care; her laughter filled community gatherings. Her passing leaves a void in the lives of twelve immediate family members and friends who mourn her spirit. As we remember Elizabeth, we reflect on her favorite hymn, Amazing Grace, which echoed through the sanctuary as she offered hope and healing. We raise our voices in gratitude for a life lived, a testament to love, faith, and compassion. Let us pray: Heavenly Father, comfort those who grieve, grant strength to carry forward her legacy, and fill our hearts with peace until we meet again.

4.details:
long time no see
catch up on recent events since we seperated
catch up on people we grew up with
a bit of gossip about those we did not like and those we liked
i heard  a few things about you moving and graduating sending congradulation
4.model_generation:
Hey there,

Long time no see! Since we last spoke, my life’s been a whirlwind: I started a new job at the publishing house, finally painted my apartment walls, and joined a weekend soccer league. I heard you graduated and moved to Chicago—huge congratulations! I’m thrilled for you and can’t wait to hear all about your new home.

Have you kept up with Lisa? She’s painting murals for local cafes now. And remember Tom? He shifted into real estate after his startup folded—talk about a pivot. Poor Michelle is still dealing with the same demanding boss, but she’s planning a European tour next spring. Some things never change!

I miss our spontaneous road trips and late-night chats. Let’s not let more time slip by—how about a video call soon? Drop me a line and let me know a time that works for you.

Take care,
4.final_version:
Hey there,

Long time no see! Since we last spoke, my life’s been a whirlwind: I started a new job at the publishing house, finally painted my apartment walls, and joined a weekend soccer league. I heard you graduated and moved to Chicago—huge congratulations! I’m thrilled for you and can’t wait to hear all about your new home.

Have you kept up with Lisa? She’s painting murals for local cafes now. And remember Tom? He shifted into real estate after his startup folded—talk about a pivot. Poor Michelle is still dealing with the same demanding boss, but she’s planning a European tour next spring. Some things never change!

I miss our spontaneous road trips and late-night chats. i miss out weird laugh as a group when someone says something to us . how the kids and family ? i really want to catch up . Let’s not let more time slip by—how about a video call soon? Drop me a line and let me know a time that works for you.

Take care,

5.details:
mention my struggles
explain why i needed that support
explain how they helps me so much
how they motivated me to go forward
how i will pay it forward or pay it back depending on them
showing complete gratitude fo everythirng they helped with
5.model_generation:
Dear Friends,

I want to express my heartfelt thanks for the incredible support you gave me when I was overwhelmed by financial strain and self-doubt. At a time when I struggled to balance work and studies, your generosity and encouragement arrived like a lifeline. Your thoughtful advice, timely assistance, and unwavering belief in my potential lifted a burden I feared I could never bear.

Each conversation, message, and act of kindness reminded me that I was never alone. Your motivation pushed me to keep moving forward, even on days when my confidence faltered. Because of you, I regained hope and energy to pursue my goals with renewed optimism.

I am committed to paying your kindness forward by helping others in need, and I will always be ready to repay your generosity. Thank you so much for standing by me and believing in my journey.

With profound gratitude,
